text.tspan: Five users, five layers of the same first hour.
Each participant entered Blender from a different place — and broke at a different layer. Read across the row and the layers
I’m staring at a cube with no
session one. When it doesn’t, he
One stray zoom and the object,
Doesn’t want a manual. Wants one
concise line on what a tool does
and why it matters before she’ll
“No one told me what a mode is
— or why I would ever want
nothing here is broken. The first
never says what a beginner is
Different entry points, one failure — the first hour is unreadable,
expertise all name the same gap: the interface
withholds its own state. Fix legibility and four
of five breakdowns ease at once.
